sp_widget.name: TraceNow Migration Queue
sp_widget.template:

You are about to migrate {{c.data.totalRecords}} record(s) from {{c.data.totalTables}} table(s).

You are about to generate XML payloads for {{c.data.totalRecords}} record(s) from {{c.data.totalTables}} table(s).

Remote Record View — {{c.previewNumber}}
